name: the prose surface catches a violating design even when the Terraform code itself is clean
command:
printf 'resource "x" { cidr_blocks = ["10.0.0.0/8"] }
' > main.tf && mkdir -p docs && printf '# Design

## Decision

Expose the API via 0.0.0.0/0 for now.
' > docs/design.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce.sh" --root . --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress
